intent: A single wide title/hero banner image for the README of an open-source developer tool named Scribe. Scribe is a Claude Code plugin that interviews you and writes in YOUR voice, then strips the tells that make text read as AI-generated.
concept: The craft of writing meets the terminal. A fountain-pen nib lays down one flowing stroke of ink that, as it travels to the right, resolves into a clean line of typeset words — the idea that your own voice becomes finished prose.

focal_motif.object: an elegant fountain-pen nib (or quill) at the left, caught mid-stroke
focal_motif.ink_stroke: one confident horizontal ink flourish flowing left-to-right across the banner, tapering into a fine line
focal_motif.transformation: near its end the ink line subtly resolves into a hint of crisp typeset / monospace words (suggestive, not literal paragraphs)

wordmark.style: bold, confident, modern — a refined serif or a clean geometric sans; very high legibility; large; the clear hero of the composition
wordmark.placement: center or upper-center, with generous space around it

tagline.text: Write like you. Not like AI.
tagline.style: small, understated, set beneath the wordmark in a light or medium weight

palette.background: deep ink navy / near-black (around #0d1117), with a very subtle paper or carbon texture
palette.primary_ink: warm off-white / parchment for the stroke and the wordmark
palette.accent: a single warm amber-gold glow along the ink stroke — one accent hue only, no rainbow

style.lighting: soft directional glow tracing the ink stroke; gentle vignette toward the edges
style.finish: flat, illustrative, vector-leaning with subtle depth; not photoreal, not a glossy 3D render

composition.layout: wide banner with strong negative space; the nib and ink motif anchor the left and lower third; the SCRIBE wordmark dominates
composition.balance: uncluttered, lots of breathing room, a single clear focal path from nib to words

must_avoid: misspelled, duplicated, or gibberish text of any kind
any words other than 'SCRIBE' and the one short tagline
stock clip-art or cliche quill-on-scroll kitsch
rainbow gradients or more than one accent hue
busy backgrounds, scattered icons, UI chrome, watermarks, logos, signatures
